---
applyTo: "**/*"
---
# BauCuaFE Frontend Starter Instructions
# Generated: 2026-03-30
# Based on: workspace setup role detection

This root is treated as the frontend for the BauCua product. The stack is not yet detected from package or config files, so these are starter instructions.

- Keep UI components focused, reusable, and easy to compose.
- Centralize backend API access so data fetching is not scattered across views.
- Preserve accessibility and responsive behavior in every screen.
- Separate presentation from data-loading logic wherever practical.
- Regenerate these instructions after the frontend stack files are added.
